# PERF-007 negative: explicit close inside loop body
lang: go
file: PERF-007-safe.go
---
package sample

import "os"

func CloseAll(paths []string) error {
	for _, p := range paths {
		f, err := os.Open(p)
		if err != nil {
			return err
		}
		if err := f.Close(); err != nil {
			return err
		}
	}
	return nil
}
